parameters.content:
## Fill ANY PDF — no template needed (AI vision)

This variant handles forms you have **not** templated. A vision model looks at the rendered form (with the detected field boxes labelled) and decides which value goes in which field. Everything else is deterministic.

**Setup:**
1. JustFill API key → https://justfill.app/account → API keys
2. OpenRouter API key → https://openrouter.ai/keys
3. Paste both into the **Config** node.

Uses OpenRouter (one key, many models). Pick any vision model in Config — e.g. `openai/gpt-4o-mini`, `google/gemini-flash-1.5`, `anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet`. To use the OpenAI API directly instead, change the model URL to `https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions` and the model to `gpt-4o-mini`.

**Trade-off vs the deterministic workflow:** works on any form with no template, but costs one model call per run and there is no human review — treat it as best-effort. For recurring / high-stakes forms use `fill-pdf-workflow.json` (template, deterministic).

parameters.formDescription: Upload a PDF (no template needed) and describe the data to put in it.
